2604.05091.title: MegaTrain: Full Precision Training of 100B+ Parameter Large Language Models on a Single GPU
2604.05091.paper_summary: We present MegaTrain, a memory-centric system that efficiently trains 100B+ parameter large language models at full precision on a single GPU. Unlike traditional GPU-centric systems, MegaTrain stores parameters and optimizer states in host memory (CPU memory) and treats GPUs as transient compute engines. For each layer, we stream parameters in and compute gradients out, minimizing persistent device state. To battle the CPU-GPU bandwidth bottleneck, we adopt two key optimizations. 1) We introduce a pipelined double-buffered execution engine that overlaps parameter prefetching, computation, and gradient offloading across multiple CUDA streams, enabling continuous GPU execution. 2) We replace persistent autograd graphs with stateless layer templates, binding weights dynamically as they stream in, eliminating persistent graph metadata while providing flexibility in scheduling. On a single H200 GPU with 1.5TB host memory, MegaTrain reliably trains models up to 120B parameters. It also achieves 1.84$\times$ the training throughput of DeepSpeed ZeRO-3 with CPU offloading when training 14B models. MegaTrain also enables 7B model training with 512k token context on a single GH200.
2604.05091.paper_summary_zh: 我們提出了 MegaTrain，一個以記憶體為中心的系統，能夠在單個 GPU 上以全精度高效訓練超過 100B 參數的大型語言模型。與傳統的以 GPU 為中心的系統不同，MegaTrain 將參數和優化器狀態存儲在主記憶體（CPU 記憶體）中，並將 GPU 視為瞬時計算引擎。對於每一層，我們流式傳輸參數並計算梯度，最小化持久的設備狀態。為了應對 CPU-GPU 帶寬瓶頸，我們採用了兩個關鍵優化。1）我們引入了一個管線化的雙緩衝執行引擎，重疊參數預取、計算和梯度卸載，跨越多個 CUDA 流，實現持續的 GPU 執行。2）我們用無狀態層模板替換持久的自動微分圖，動態綁定權重，隨著它們的流入，消除持久圖元數據，同時提供調度的靈活性。在單個 H200 GPU 和 1.5TB 主記憶體上，MegaTrain 能夠可靠地訓練高達 120B 參數的模型。在訓練 14B 模型時，它的訓練吞吐量也達到了 DeepSpeed ZeRO-3 的 1.84 倍，並且進行 CPU 卸載。MegaTrain 還能夠在單個 GH200 上進行 512k 令牌上下文的 7B 模型訓練。
2604.05091.author: Zhengqing Yuan et.al.
2604.05091.authors: Zhengqing Yuan, Hanchi Sun, Lichao Sun, Yanfang Ye
